title: ageratina rangelii
intro: Ageratina rangelii, also known as Rangel's mountain mint, is a plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ageratina rangelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Ageratina rangelii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
